hero.label: LANDING PAGES & APP DEVELOPER
hero.description: I design, build, and ship digital experiences that turn visitors into customers — from first impression to the last tap on mobile.

manifesto.body:
Every pixel has a purpose. Every scroll tells a story. I don't build pages — I build visual arguments that guide users from interest to action.

On mobile, this is even more critical: smaller screens demand absolute clarity. No distraction. No friction. Just conversion.

projects.title: Projects that deliver results.
projects.subtitle: Each project is a response to a real problem. From strategy to deploy, from first screen to last pixel.
projects.more_description: New projects in the works. Get in touch to find out what's coming next.

aqua.title: Aqua – Water Tracker
aqua.description: Hydration tracking app with home screen widget. Available on the App Store.

solaris.title: Solaris – Focus & Productivity
solaris.description: +380 downloads. Focus, widgets and app blocking via Screen Time API.

lucascorretor.title: Lucas Corretor
lucascorretor.description: Landing page for a real estate agent in Brasília, with lead capture and property showcase.

skills.title: The right tools for every challenge.

about.title: The person behind the code.
about.body:
I'm João Felipe Schwaab — a developer focused on building digital experiences that work. I started with landing pages because I believe first impressions are everything. I expanded into mobile because users live on their phones.

My obsession: understanding why people click, scroll, and convert. Every project is a new hypothesis about human behavior.

cta.body: Get in touch and within 24h we'll have the project aligned.

annotations.manifesto: Philosophy before portfolio. Context builds trust.
annotations.stats: Social proof before work. Numbers persuade.
annotations.projects: Bento grid: visual hierarchy through scale.
annotations.skills: Grouped by domain, not by icon.
annotations.about: Personal connection. Tech is made by humans.
